generated_oml:
// Sensing components
instance GreenhouseTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor located in the greenhouse to capture ambient temperature for climate control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor located in the greenhouse to record moisture levels for HVAC regulation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseHVACSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Combined sensor measuring greenhouse environmental conditions to inform adaptive HVAC control models."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseHVACDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityIndoorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality sensor node capturing concentration of CO₂, VOCs, and particulate matter."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirflowSimulationInputSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Simulator input sensor providing airflow boundary conditions for pollutant dispersion modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirflowSimulationDataTransmitted
]

instance ContaminantPredictionInputSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Historical data feed sensor supplying time-series of contaminant levels for predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PredictionInputDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensing device measuring the crane's vertical and horizontal position and velocity in real time."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneActuatorStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing actuator states, including current position, velocity, and status flags of the gantry crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneActuatorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneMotionProfileInputSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input sensor delineating desired motion profiles for crane control optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionProfileDataTransmitted
]

instance KinematicValidationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing trajectory data for kinematic model validation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData KinematicValidationDataTransmitted
]

instance OptimalControlInputSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor input for the optimal‑control model, including payload mass and dynamic constraints."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OptimalControlDataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted
instance GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time‑series temperature observations recorded from the greenhouse temperature sensor and transmitted to InfluxDB."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseTemperatureSensor
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Time‑series humidity observations from the greenhouse humidity sensor, transmitted to InfluxDB."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseHumiditySensor
]

instance GreenhouseHVACDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Environmental data stream from the greenhouse HVAC sensor, transmitting adaptive control directives to ActiveMQ."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseHVACSensor
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Air quality metrics captured by the indoor sensor, transmitted to Azure IoT Hub."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualityIndoorSensor
]

instance AirflowSimulationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulation input parameters for airflow and pollutant dispersion, transmitted to Azure Container Instances."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirflowSimulationInputSensor
]

instance PredictionInputDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Historical contaminant data fed into prediction analytics, transmitted to Azure Functions."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ContaminantPredictionInputSensor
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Crane pose data (vertical/horizontal position, velocity) continuously written to TimescaleDB via Log app."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance CraneActuatorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Actuator state flags and kinematic data transmitted to ActiveMQ for real‑time monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneActuatorStateSensor
]

instance MotionProfileDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Desired motion profile data sent to ActiveMQ for crane command execution."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneMotionProfileInputSensor
]

instance KinematicValidationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Observed trajectory data transmitted to TimescaleDB for validation against kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom KinematicValidationSensor
]

instance OptimalControlDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Optimal‑control parameters transmitted to TimescaleDB for computation and storage."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OptimalControlInputSensor
]

// Data artifacts
instance GreenhouseTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded temperature measurement stored in InfluxDB for historical analysis and model validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded humidity measurement stored in InfluxDB for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseHVACData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Environmental data stored in ActiveMQ for real‑time HVAC control messaging."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActiveMQEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseHVACDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Air quality metrics stored in Azure IoT Hub for downstream analytics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirflowSimulationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulation parameters stored in Azure Container Instances for airflow modeling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureContainerEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirflowSimulationDataTransmitted
]

instance PredictionInputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical contaminant data stored in Azure Functions for predictive modeling."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureFunctionsEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData PredictionInputDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane pose data stored in TimescaleDB for real‑time monitoring and post‑hoc analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneActuatorStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Actuator state data stored in ActiveMQ for real‑time visibility."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActiveMQEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneActuatorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance MotionProfileData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired motion profile data stored in ActiveMQ for command dispatch."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActiveMQEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotionProfileDataTransmitted
]

instance KinematicValidationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Observed trajectory data stored in TimescaleDB for kinematic validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData KinematicValidationDataTransmitted
]

instance OptimalControlData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Optimal‑control parameters stored in TimescaleDB for execution and audit."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData OptimalControlDataTransmitted
]

// Enablers
instance InfluxDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database instance hosting time-series greenhouse environmental data for monitoring and control services."
    DTDFVocab:enables GreenhouseTemperatureMonitoringService, GreenhouseHumidityMonitoringService
]

instance ActiveMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker enabling real‑time event exchange between the physical greenhouse and the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables HVACControlService, CraneActuatorMonitoringService, CraneMotionProfileService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time-series database interfacing with the crane telemetry log application for real‑time and historical storage."
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDataLoggingService, KinematicValidationService, OptimalControlService
]

instance AzureIoTHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure IoT Hub service ingesting sensor data from the indoor air quality node for downstream analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService
]

instance AzureContainerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure Container Instances orchestrating the air‑flow simulation model."
    DTDFVocab:enables AirflowSimulationService
]

instance AzureFunctionsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure Functions executing predictive analytics to forecast contaminant levels."
    DTDFVocab:enables ContaminantPredictionService
]

// Services
instance GreenhouseTemperatureMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time monitoring of greenhouse temperature and visual feedback to operators."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseTemperatureInsight
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering real‑time humidity monitoring and alerting within the greenhouse."
    DTDFVocab:provides GreenhouseHumidityInsight
]

instance HVACControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service computing and delivering HVAC control commands to stabilize greenhouse climate based on adaptation models."
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACControlAction
]

instance AirQualityRuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real‑time dashboards of indoor air quality metrics to operator panels."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityMetricInsight
]

instance AirflowSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating airflow and pollutant dispersion to evaluate containment strategies."
    DTDFVocab:provides AirflowSimulationInsight
]

instance ContaminantPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service predicting future contaminant levels using historical sensor data for proactive decision support."
    DTDFVocab:provides ContaminantPredictionInsight, ProactiveControlAction
]

instance CraneDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real‑time logging of crane pose data for post‑hoc analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides CranePositionHistoryInsight
]

instance CraneActuatorMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service monitoring actuator states of the gantry crane in real time."
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneActuatorStateInsight
]

instance CraneMotionProfileService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating and dispatching motion profile command to minimize energy and trajectory time."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionProfileInsight, CraneMotionProfileAction
]

instance KinematicValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating the crane’s kinematic model against measured trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicValidationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal control commands for crane operations derived from the optimal‑control model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

// Insights
instance GreenhouseTemperatureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into greenhouse temperature trends and compliance with setpoint thresholds."
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into humidity levels affecting internal plant health and equipment."
]

instance AirQualityMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into indoor CO₂, VOC, particulate concentrations for operator awareness."
]

instance AirflowSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into simulated airflow patterns and pollutant dispersion pathways."
]

instance ContaminantPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into predicted contaminant trajectories and future concentration levels."
]

instance CranePositionHistoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into historical crane position and movement patterns."
]

instance CraneActuatorStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into real‑time actuator state and health status."
]

instance KinematicValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into discrepancies between modeled and observed kinematics."
]

instance MotionProfileInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into efficiency gains achieved through optimized motion profiles."
]

// Actions
instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic HVAC control command computed by the twin to maintain greenhouse climatic conditions."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ProactiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Proactive air quality control action dispatched when predictive model forecasts contaminant spikes."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CraneMotionProfileAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Motion profile command computed to minimize energy consumption and trajectory time for crane movement."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal control command generated for crane operations based on the optimal‑control model."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application (Python) and sent through the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane’s controllers. The interface establishes a direct connection to the crane controls—typically via a vendor‑specific low‑level protocol over serial or CAN (specific protocol not detailed). Movement instructions, trajectory parameters, and safety limits are transmitted as command messages from the Python application to the crane. The physical crane executes these commands, while any acknowledgement or status feedback is intended to be captured by the Logging Application (acknowledgement implementation details are not specified in the document)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin is managed by an MQTT broker that facilitates publish/subscribe messaging among services such as the Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, and Dashboard services. The broker operates over TCP using the standard MQTT protocol. No additional network protocols, topology details, or architecture specifications are provided in the document for the broader physical‑to‑digital link."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The exemplar adopts the AutomationML specification for its digital‑twin model, ensuring alignment with mechanistic engineering data‑exchange standards. Core datastore and messaging components include InfluxDB for time‑series data and ActiveMQ for message brokering, both widely recognized open‑source standards in industrial automation."
]
